_comment: Copy to config/telegram-chats.json and replace ids with real Telegram chat ids (groups/supergroups use negative ids).

-1001234567890._comment: Privacy mode ON (BotFather default, recommended): the bot only receives commands/mentions/replies here, matching requireMention: true.
-1001234567890.name: general

-1009876543210._comment: requireMention: false only does something useful once you disable privacy mode for this bot via BotFather — otherwise Telegram itself still withholds ordinary messages from the bot.
-1009876543210.name: announcements
